backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a PreOrder type and two functions: submitPreOrder to create and store orders with a calculated total price, and getAllPreOrders to return all stored orders as an array.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to update Desi Mango 10 kg box pricing to ₹350 in PreOrderForm.tsx, including dynamic total calculation and WhatsApp message updates, with high confidence and linked to test REQ-37.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, utility, and style file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the N.B. Farm React app, setting page metadata, SEO tags, Open Graph properties, Google Fonts preconnect, and mounting the React root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full single-page layout by rendering all section components (Navigation, Hero, About, Products, Gallery, PreOrderForm, etc.) separated by RangoliDivider decorators.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying N.B. Farm's story with a Gir cow illustration, four feature cards highlighting farm values, a floating '3 Generations of Farming' badge, and a Sanskrit quote.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact & Orders section with WhatsApp, phone, and email contact cards, social media links, and a quick inquiry form that composes and sends a pre-filled WhatsApp message on submission.
Delivery Information section displaying four colored cards covering local delivery, morning milk supply, mango shipping, and bulk orders, plus a WhatsApp CTA banner at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/FarmGallerySecti: Renders a responsive photo gallery grid of N.B. Farm images with a lightbox modal that supports next/previous navigation and keyboard accessibility.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with the N.B. Farm brand, social media links (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp), quick navigation links, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a farm sunrise background image, headline, tagline, and CTA buttons for ordering milk and pre-ordering mangoes with smooth scroll navigation.
Shows the farm's location via an embedded Google Maps iframe alongside an address card with the physical address, phone numbers, and a directions link.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with the farm logo, desktop nav links, a WhatsApp order button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu with smooth scroll behavior.
frontend/src/components/PreOrderForm.tsx: React form component for mango pre-orders that calculates pricing by variant and box size, validates input, opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message, and submits order data to the backend via a mutation hook.
Displays N.B. Farm's product catalog including Gir A2 milk, mangoes, lemons, and seasonal spice powders, with WhatsApp order links and feature lists for each product.
frontend/src/components/RangoliDivider.t: Decorative section divider component that renders a rangoli pattern image, with an optional flip prop to rotate it 180 degrees.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUsSecti: Renders a 'Why Choose N.B. Farm?' section with a grid of five highlight cards covering farm freshness, ethical practices, no chemicals, direct delivery, and traditional values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning an anonymous or identity-authenticated actor and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and exposing status flags via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines two React Query hooks: `useSubmitPreOrder` for mutating a pre-order via the ICP actor, and `useGetAllPreOrders` for fetching all pre-orders.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, defines an earthy OKLCH CSS variable palette for light and dark modes, and declares Tailwind utility/component classes including custom textures and typography.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/smoothScroll.ts: Utility function that smoothly scrolls the page to a target section by ID with a configurable top offset.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the farm website, extending the default theme with custom farm-palette colors (mud, turmeric, leaf, terracotta, offwhite), serif/handwritten fonts, custom shadows, and animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracker (version 27) documenting the N.B. Farm website's features, architectural notes, known issues (hero heading cutoff, mango WhatsApp pre-order broken), and existing feature list with IDs and requirement references.
